commands.author: TurboTheTurtle
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=12cf04bff800bf366c5270a597c7bc5f19ae3edc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `ReadyProbe` resolve flag so SSH-backed `crabbox status --wait` can request provider readiness material while plain status remains status-only.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `status --wait` sets `ReadyProbe`, and Tenki then falls through to `prepareLease`, which can resume paused sessions and wait under `bootstrapWaitTimeout`; I did not run a live Tenki session.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR needs contributor-supplied Tenki proof and maintainer confirmation of the non-mutating timeout-bound probe behavior before merge.

target.title: Fix CLI silent reply fallback policy
target.body:
## Summary
- pass the existing `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent` policy through the direct CLI runner path in fallback orchestration
- add a regression test proving Telegram/message-tool-only Claude CLI turns receive the silent-empty policy instead of falling into `empty_response` fallback handling

Fixes #91302.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed**: Claude CLI/message-tool-only turns can validly complete by sending through the message tool and then returning empty assistant text. `get-reply-run` already marks those turns with `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent`, and the CLI runner already honors that flag, but the direct CLI fallback orchestration path was dropping the flag. This PR forwards the policy so that path produces the silent reply token instead of triggering the `empty_response` fallback and a duplicate user-visible reply.
- **Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw PR checkout `/Users/andy/openclaw-91302` on branch `codex/91302-cli-tool-empty-success`, head `72c23924316c7422c0eca816804704b681aae0aa`, Node/Vitest through the repository scripts.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```sh
git rev-parse HEAD
rg -n "allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent" src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'passes silent empty-reply policy to CLI backends for message-tool-only turns'
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.reliability.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.media-only.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts
```
- **Evidence after fix**:
```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
72c23924316c7422c0eca816804704b681aae0aa

$ rg -n "allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent" src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts:2191:                      params.followupRun.run.allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent,
src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts:1887:    followupRun.run.allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent = true;
src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts:1905:      allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent: true,

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'passes silent empty-reply policy to CLI backends for message-tool-only turns'
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/andy/openclaw-91302

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  1 passed | 183 skipped (184)
   Start at  21:04:39
   Duration  1.99s (transform 839ms, setup 58ms, import 1.58s, tests 223ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 2.74s

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.reliability.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 72.05s

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.media-only.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 26.41s
```
- **Observed result after fix**: The after-fix focused regression creates a Telegram group/message-tool-only `claude-cli` follow-up run and observes the direct CLI backend params include `allowEmptyAssistantReplyAsSilent: true`, `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"`, and Telegram channel/provider context. The existing CLI reliability coverage then proves the CLI runner returns the silent reply token instead of `empty_response` when that flag is present.
- **What was not tested**: A live Telegram plus Claude CLI provider run was not performed in this local checkout; this source-repro issue was validated with PR-head source inspection and after-fix OpenClaw runner tests for the exact policy handoff.

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.reliability.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner.spawn.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.media-only.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`

@clawsweeper re-review
